'''thadudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabeljou|kabeljou]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabeljou|kabeljou]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thadudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædidhith|thædidhith]] || [[word:thædidhij|thædidhij]] || [[word:thædidhish|thædidhish]] || [[word:thædidhi|thædidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadududhuth|thadududhuth]] || [[word:thadududhuj|thadududhuj]] || [[word:thadududhush|thadududhush]] || [[word:thadududhu|thadududhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadudhuth|thadudhuth]] || [[word:thadudhuj|thadudhuj]] || [[word:thadudhush|thadudhush]] || [[word:thadudhu|thadudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadufdhuth|thadufdhuth]] || [[word:thadufdhuj|thadufdhuj]] || [[word:thadufdhush|thadufdhush]] || [[word:thadufdhuf|thadufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadudhuthu|thadudhuthu]] || [[word:thadudhuju|thadudhuju]] || [[word:thadudhushu|thadudhushu]] || [[word:thadudhuku|thadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadudhuth|thadudhuth]] || [[word:thadudhuj|thadudhuj]] || [[word:thadudhush|thadudhush]] || [[word:thadudhu|thadudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadudhuthul|thadudhuthul]] || [[word:thadudhujul|thadudhujul]] || [[word:thadudhushul|thadudhushul]] || [[word:thadudhukul|thadudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadudhuthuthu|thadudhuthuthu]] || [[word:thadudhujuju|thadudhujuju]] || [[word:thadudhushushu|thadudhushushu]] || [[word:thadudhuku|thadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadudhuthun|thadudhuthun]] || [[word:thadudhujun|thadudhujun]] || [[word:thadudhushun|thadudhushun]] || [[word:thadudhukun|thadudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadudhuthuoro|thadudhuthuoro]] || [[word:thadudhujuoro|thadudhujuoro]] || [[word:thadudhushuoro|thadudhushuoro]] || [[word:thadudhukuoro|thadudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
